rule CDB_CVE20265001__PromtEngineer_localGPT_serv {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for CVE-2026-5001 - PromtEngineer localGPT server.py do_POST unrestricted upload"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-03-28"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-5001" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "PromtEngineer" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-5001 - PromtEngineer localGPT server.py do_POST unr"; content:"CVE-2026-5001"; nocase; sid:1066180; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
